name: Portside Finance
description_short: Jacksonville-based personal lender offering $500–$5,000 loans with 12–18 month terms and a 35.9% APR. Fast approval with flexible repayment options.
description_long:
Portside Finance (operating as "Quick Loans") is a Florida-based personal lending company with physical locations in Jacksonville and North Port. The company markets itself as a community-focused lender offering quick loan approvals and friendly service to borrowers with unexpected expenses or planned purchases.

Portside Finance offers unsecured personal loans ranging from $500 to $5,000 with repayment terms between 12 and 18 months. The company advertises 30-minute loan approvals and claims to serve borrowers seeking alternatives to traditional banking. Loan amounts may require collateral (first or second lien on a vehicle no more than ten years old) depending on the applicant's creditworthiness.

The company distinguishes itself through in-person service at two physical branch locations and a stated commitment to personalized lending tailored to individual financial situations. They promote flexible repayment plans and position themselves as "neighbors" familiar with the local community rather than impersonal corporate lenders.

While Portside Finance offers faster approval than traditional banks, the 35.9% APR is significantly higher than standard personal loan rates and reflects the higher-risk lending market. The $25 credit investigation fee and $25 annual anniversary fee add to the total cost of borrowing. Prospective borrowers should carefully compare this option against credit unions, payday alternative lenders (under 36% APR), or larger personal loan lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loan amounts up to $5,000 available, higher than typical payday loans
Extended repayment terms (12–18 months) allow lower monthly payments than short-term cash loans
Physical branch locations in Jacksonville and North Port for in-person service and relationship building
Advertises 30-minute loan approval timeline for faster access to funds
Flexible loan purposes (debt consolidation, purchases, emergencies) without stated restrictions
Clear fee disclosure: $25 credit investigation fee + $25 annual anniversary fee (transparent cost structure)
APR stated upfront at 35.9% with example calculation provided for consumer understanding
cons: 35.9% APR is significantly higher than credit unions, payday alternative lenders, and mainstream personal loan lenders
Collateral may be required (first or second lien on vehicle under 10 years old) for larger amounts or weaker credit
Geographic restriction: borrowers must live within 45 miles of Jacksonville or North Port office to apply
Total cost of $1,000 loan over 12 months is $1,255.55 (25.5% total interest + fees), making it an expensive borrowing option
APR varies by applicant; lowest advertised rates not guaranteed and depend on credit approval and underwriting
best_for: Borrowers in the Jacksonville/North Port area with moderate credit who prefer in-person lending relationships
Consumers needing $1,000–$5,000 with ability to repay over 12–18 months rather than 2–4 weeks
Applicants with vehicle collateral who may not qualify for unsecured personal loans elsewhere
People seeking faster approval than traditional banks but who don't qualify for credit union or lower-APR alternatives
diagnosis: Portside Finance is best suited for borrowers within 45 miles of Jacksonville or North Port who need $1,000–$5,000 and prefer local, in-person lending with extended repayment terms. However, the 35.9% APR is substantially higher than credit unions and payday alternative lenders (typically capped at 36% APR nationally); borrowers should compare options with NCUs, CDFIs, and mainstream lenders before accepting this rate.
services: Auto loans (mentioned on website, terms not detailed)
Cash loans with quick approval (30 minutes claimed)
In-person loan application and consultation at branch locations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
